docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAJRAMI, MURAT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SWITALA, JACK DBA  QUALITY REFINISHING & LIKE NU TILE NOTHING IN THIS JUDGMENT SHALL ACT TO VOID EXISTING WARRANTIES OF DEFENDANT'S WORK OR THE PRODUCTS APPLIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SWITALA, JACK DBA  QUALITY REFINISHING & LIKE NU TILE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-21-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SWITALA, JACK DBA  QUALITY REFINISHING & LIKE NU TILE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY BAJRAMI, MURAT AS TO DEFENDANT SWITALA, JACK DBA  QUALITY REFINISHING & LIKE NU TILE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-06-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (505)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2010 - JUDGMENT.
